data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Verified the implementation in /Users/cartine/foolery/.knots/_worktree/foolery-81ad against the acceptance criteria: beat-scoped token_usage lines are persisted with explicit beatId and agent identity, history parsing aggregates saved tokenUsageByAgent per beat without session-scope inference, and diagnostics renders the saved per-agent token counts. Validation on the review target worktree passed: bun run lint (pre-existing warning only in src/components/beat-form.tsx), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
